supported_devices: fans, heaters, dehumidifiers, humidifiers, CO2 equipment, pumps, solenoid valves, grow lights, curtain motors
compatible_ec_fans: any EC fan with compatible TrolMaster EC fan control adapter (max 4 adapters)
compatible_lights: any grow light via light control adapter; max 256 fixtures per channel × 2 channels
compatible_sensors: MBS-GH (temp/humidity/CO2/light 4-in-1, included), MBS-WS (weather station), MBS-PAR (PPFD), AMP-3 (pH/EC/temp), WCS-1/WCS-2/WCS-3 (water content/EC/temp, max 8), DFM-1/2/3 (flow meter), WD-1 (water detector), MBS-SD (smoke detector)
compatible_humidifiers: any on/off humidifier via DS humidity control station (max 4 stations)
compatible_irrigation: any 24VDC or 110VAC solenoid valve or pump via OA6-24, OAT-24, OA6-110 control boards; up to 96 scheduled outputs
compatible_co2_equipment: any CO2 device via DS CO2 control station (max 2 stations)
recommended_use_note: Advanced modular greenhouse control system for irrigation, climate, CO2, lighting, and sensor integration; designed for professional greenhouse operations
uvp_notes: US retailer price; no EUR price confirmed at time of research; LCD 256×160 display; output current 3A
notes: Greenhouse-focused controller; wired Ethernet only (no WiFi); includes MBS-GH 4-in-1 sensor (temp/humidity/CO2/light); up to 96 irrigation outputs, 4 motor controllers, 4 EC fan adapters; firmware v2.7 as of Sep 2025
